title: Is the monday.com community a valid market for launching a new project management integration?
excerpt: We’re exploring the possibility of launching a new integration tool designed to enhance project management workflows on monday.com. Before investing further, we want to assess whether the active users here represent a va…

posts.author: validmarket (validmarket)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re exploring the possibility of launching a new integration tool designed to enhance project management workflows on monday.com. Before investing further, we want to assess whether the active users here represent a valid market. What factors should we consider to determine market validity within this community? Any insights on user needs, adoption trends, or feature gaps would be greatly appreciated.
